channel.title: General Availability on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in General Availability on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Code Quality is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Code Quality is now generally available for GitHub Enterprise Cloud and GitHub Team. The announcement says it is intended to help with the growing volume of code produced with AI assistance.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: Announcing: Agent Harness in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now has general availability for Agent Harness, the production runtime for agents built with the framework. Preview harness users can move the same agent code into production with backward compatibility.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: New pull requests dashboard is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub’s refreshed pull requests dashboard is now generally available at github.com/pulls. It provides a single place to track, prioritize, and act on pull requests that need attention.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Secret scanning extended metadata and multipart validation
item.description:
GitHub secret scanning now surfaces extended metadata for supported secret types to help identify ownership and impact of leaked secrets. The update also includes general availability of extended metadata checks and multipart validation support.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Issue fields are now generally available
item.description:
Issue fields are now generally available for all GitHub organizations on Free, Team, Enterprise, and GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency plans. Support will also ship in GitHub Enterprise Server 3.23.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Kimi K2.7 Code is generally available in GitHub Copilot
item.description:
Kimi K2.7 Code is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. It is the first open-weight model available as a selectable option in the Copilot model picker.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Document PII NextGen Playground in Azure AI Language
item.description:
Azure AI Language’s Document PII NextGen Playground is now generally available. It provides a refreshed experience for evaluating document PII detection with curated sample inputs and outputs.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Browser tools for GitHub Copilot in VS Code are generally available
item.description:
Browser tools for GitHub Copilot in VS Code are now generally available. GitHub also clarified which permissions remain under user control and noted that existing network domain controls still apply.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot for Jira is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot for Jira is now generally available after a public preview that began in March 2026. GitHub says it has added several improvements since preview, including model selection.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot CLI: New terminal interface is generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI’s redesigned terminal interface is now generally available. It adds a tabbed layout for working with GitHub directly from the terminal.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Auto mode in Copilot Chat available for all users
item.description:
GitHub Copilot auto model selection is now generally available in Copilot Chat on github.com and the GitHub mobile app for all Copilot plans. In auto mode, Copilot selects the model for the chat request.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available. The release adds improvements in deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, including organization custom properties now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Files assessments are now available worldwide using Azure Migrate
item.description:
Azure Migrate now generally supports discovery and assessment of SMB and NFS file shares on Windows and Linux servers worldwide. The update provides a data-driven view of file share environments and helps customers plan migration.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] General Availability: Backup your ledger files for audit with Azure confidential ledger’s new tool
item.description:
Azure Confidential Ledger introduced a new localized web tool for backing up ledger files so auditors can inspect them and verify cryptographic proofs. The update is in general availability.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Text Analytics for Health NextGen Playground in Azure AI Language
item.description:
The next-generation Text Analytics for Health (TA4H) playground is now generally available in the Microsoft Foundry portal. It lets users paste clinical text such as discharge summaries, doctor’s notes, or research abstracts for analysis.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Simple log alerts in Azure Monitor
item.description:
Azure Monitor’s Simple log alerts are now generally available. The feature adds a simplified way to create log-based alerts for monitoring and alerting.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Agent kit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB Agent Kit is now generally available. It adds Cosmos DB best practices to AI coding workflows for building database applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Unified Text Translation API in Azure AI Translator
item.description:
Azure AI Translator’s Unified Text Translation API is now generally available. It provides a single endpoint for multiple translation backends, including neural machine translation, large language model translation, small language model translation, and Adaptive custom translation.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Dynamic threshold for Log search alerts
item.description:
General availability of Dynamic threshold for Log search alerts. Dynamic thresholds automatically calculate appropriate alert thresholds, reducing the need to set a fixed threshold manually.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Center now provides a data plane MCP server for enterprise-wide discovery of APIs and AI assets.
item.description:
Azure API Center now includes a data plane MCP server in general availability for enterprise-wide discovery of APIs and AI assets. The update is aimed at helping developers and agents find and connect to enterprise MCP servers, tools, APIs, and AI assets more easily.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Center now supports agent registration, agent assessment, and Git-based synchronization.
item.description:
Azure API Center now generally supports agent registration, agent assessment, and Git-based synchronization. The update is positioned as a way to help teams discover, govern, and reuse autonomous AI agents across an organization.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Management now supports content safety controls for MCP and A2A APIs.
item.description:
Azure API Management is now generally available with content safety controls for MCP and A2A APIs. It is intended to help organizations apply consistent safety and compliance policies across agent interactions.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Management workspaces now support the built-in gateway
item.description:
Azure API Management workspaces now support the built-in gateway in general availability. This removes the prior requirement for a dedicated workspace gateway and Premium tier deployment, reducing cost and operational complexity.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Custom Avatar and Custom Video portal in Microsoft Foundry
item.description:
Azure AI Speech has made the Custom Avatar and Custom Video authoring experiences generally available in the Microsoft Foundry portal. Approved customers can upload actor recordings, fine-tune a custom video avatar, and generate synthetic media.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: GitHub Copilot integration in Schema Designer for the MSSQL extension
item.description:
GitHub Copilot integration in Schema Designer for the MSSQL extension is now generally available in Visual Studio Code. It adds AI-assisted capabilities to the visual schema design experience.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Graceful failover with zero data loss guarantee
item.description:
Azure DocumentDB now generally available supports graceful failover that promotes replica clusters with a zero data loss guarantee. It is an addition to the existing force promote option, which promotes immediately.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Improved PDF batch document translation in Azure AI Translator
item.description:
Azure AI Translator’s batch document translation for PDF is now generally available with improvements for PDF translation. It uses Azure AI Document Intelligence to recover structure from both digital-native and scanned PDFs before translating the recognized text.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: MCP Toolkit for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
The MCP Toolkit for Azure Cosmos DB is now generally available. It provides a standardized way to connect AI agents and copilots to Cosmos DB operational data and capabilities.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Photo Avatar standard and custom in Azure AI Speech
item.description:
Photo Avatar in Azure AI Speech is now generally available in both standard and custom versions. Standard Photo Avatar generates a talking-head video from a single photo at 512x512 resolution, and custom Photo Avatar allows look fine-tuning from your own images.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot SDK is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot SDK is now generally available. It provides a stable API and production-ready support for embedding Copilot’s agentic engine into applications, services, and developer tools.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot CLI: Improved UI, rubber duck, prompt scheduling, and voice input
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI is getting a UI refresh, with a new experimental terminal interface and support for tabs. Rubber duck, prompt scheduling, and voice input are generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Entra-only identities with Azure Files
item.description:
Azure Files now supports generally available Entra-only identities for SMB access. This lets organizations use cloud-native identities to access file shares without requiring Active Directory or hybrid identity infrastructure.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Event Grid releases for April 2026
item.description:
Azure Event Grid namespaces are expanding MQTT capabilities to support more connected, scalable, standards-based real-time solutions. The release is intended to simplify backend integration and improve responsiveness for device experiences.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Mock runs for Azure Storage Actions – Validate before you execute
item.description:
Azure Storage Actions now supports mock runs in general availability. This lets users simulate task execution at full scale before making any changes to Azure Blob or Data Lake Storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Auto activation for SaaS subscriptions in Microsoft Marketplace
item.description:
Auto activation for SaaS subscriptions is now generally available in Microsoft Marketplace. When enabled, the subscription and billing cycle start as soon as the purchase flow is completed.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Front Door WebSocket
item.description:
Azure Front Door Standard and Premium now support WebSocket in general availability. The feature is enabled by default and does not require additional configuration.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot Spaces API now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Spaces API is now generally available. It supports programmatic create, read, update, and delete operations for Spaces from external applications.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions now generally available on mobile, web, and VS Code
item.description:
Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions is now generally available on GitHub Mobile and github.com, with support also referenced for VS Code. It lets you start work in the terminal and continue managing the session from mobile or web.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Managed Identity Support for Azure Files SMB Is now GA
item.description:
Azure Files SMB now supports Managed Identities in general availability. Applications and services can authenticate to Azure Files without storing static credentials or account keys, using Entra-issued tokens instead.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Code-to-cloud risk visibility with Microsoft Defender for Cloud is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub says the code-to-cloud risk visibility integration with Microsoft Defender for Cloud is now generally available. The release includes follow-up improvements since public preview, bringing artifact and runtime context closer together.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS
item.description:
Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS in Azure Blob Storage is now generally available in all Azure regions. It adds a scope between container-level and single-blob access for SAS tokens.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GPT-5.5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
GPT-5.5 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed the model performs best on complex, multi-step agentic coding tasks and real-world problem solving.

  • Source: GitHub
